lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: Hello. You're from KODA.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: James? He is on a field trip this week and isn't in the office.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: You should arrange a time in advance... It is easier if Vikash at National Planning or someone from Naitamba village connects you.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: Hello. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Me
lines.text: I'm from KODA. I'm here to see James.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: One moment, I'll check.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: Yes, James is at his desk. Please go to the desk inside.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Have a seat. You're here from KODA about Naitamba.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: I'm with APAT - the Australia-Pacific Technical Assistance Program - handling water resources.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: That island - I know the file. Our predecessor supported a project there ten years ago.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: It didn't go well.

choices.text: "May I ask what went wrong?"
"We're trying to do it differently this time."
"We came because we need technical support."

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: After installation, there was no operator.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: The pump stopped in less than two years. No one to fix it, no budget for parts.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Installation went fine. The problem was afterward. They never built a maintenance system.
James looks out the window for a moment.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: That was the lesson. You can't just leave infrastructure behind and walk away.

choices.text: "That's why this time, we want a structure residents can operate directly."
"If you've reflected on that, could you help us do it differently?"

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Everyone says that.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: The team ten years ago probably said it too.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Can you tell me what is concretely different?

choices.text: "This time, we'll create a structure residents can operate directly."
"We're still planning. That's why I came here."

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Technical support.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: We are a support agency, but you are the first person to walk in that directly.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: I'll hear you out for now.

choices.text: "I'm sorry. I should have explained the situation first."
"The Land Office process is stuck."

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: The Land Office is the issue?

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Sela Tuilagi - she handles land consent there. I know her.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: If the village documents are ready, I can connect you.

choices.text: "Thank you. That's exactly what we needed."
"Can't we contact her directly?"

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: ...You can.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: But Sela does not like outside agencies contacting her without context.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Going through me will be much faster.
He is right.

choices.text: "That makes sense. Could I ask you to connect us?"

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: One more question.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: The village elders - what happened with Ratu?

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: If they don't accept this, our involvement won't matter.

choices.text: "I met Ratu Josefa. When we discussed a resident-managed structure, the door opened."
"I haven't met him yet. I'll bring yaqona and greet the village elder first."
"We can persuade the village side later."

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: ...That is not an easy thing to say.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Good. Let's try this together.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: I'll send the technical advisory support letter. I'll speak to Sela at the Land Office on the fifth floor. Meet her directly.
For the first time, you have an external partner.

choices.text: "Could we also design a village technician training program?"
"Thank you. I'll move quickly."

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Technician training? APAT has a curriculum tailored for Pacific island countries.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Let's do this properly this time.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Good. I'll wait to hear from you.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Let's do this properly this time.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: A yaqona gift? Sevusevu - the Fijian traditional greeting ceremony. Good that you know it.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: You can buy yaqona from a street vendor near Pacific City in Suva. Ask for dried root.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Ratu Josefa is a difficult man. But if you show respect, he will talk.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Tell me when you have results. Once the village side is settled, I can move too.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: ...I'll pretend I didn't hear that.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: If we enter without village consent, it will be exactly like ten years ago.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Come back when the village side is settled.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Have you met Sela at the Land Office?

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: It will go well. She is good at her job.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: What happened with the village side?

choices.text: "Ratu Josefa agreed. A village management committee was formed too."
"It's still in progress."

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: ...Really? Ratu Josefa?

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: He refused until the end during the previous project. A village management committee... that must have been decisive.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Good. Then APAT can move seriously too.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: I'll prepare the technician training program. Let's do this properly this time.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Understood. Contact me when you're ready.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Have you met the village elders?

choices.text: "Ratu Josefa agreed to a structure managed directly by the village."
"Not yet."

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Come back when the village side is settled.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Ratu Josefa signed? That's impressive.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: He refused during the previous project. The village management committee clause must have worked.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: I'll start preparing APAT's technician training support right away.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: Did you meet James? Thank you for coming.
